texts.text: Added to and modified the list of

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The following is a summary of enhancements provided in Vitals/Measurements V. 5.0.
texts.text: The following is a summary of enhancements provided in Vitals/Measurements V. 5.0.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: This release contains a GUI (Graphical User Interface) front end to make editing and viewing of data easier.
texts.text: This release contains a GUI (Graphical User Interface) front end to make editing and viewing of data easier.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Vital types may be configured into templates to make data entry easier. Templates can be defined for use at the System, Division, Hospital Location and User level. These templates can be defined to contain only those vital types needed with default qualifiers pre-selected. Each template displays the patient’s most recent vitals readings.
texts.text: Vital types may be configured into templates to make data entry easier. Templates can be defined for use at the System, Division, Hospital Location and User level. These templates can be defined to contain only those vital types needed with default qualifiers pre-selected. Each template displays the patient’s most recent vitals readings.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Linear graphic reports may be viewed on the screen as well as printed.
texts.text: Linear graphic reports may be viewed on the screen as well as printed.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Vitals/Measurements V. 5.0 can be setup so that it may be called from the CPRS Tools menu.
texts.text: Vitals/Measurements V. 5.0 can be setup so that it may be called from the CPRS Tools menu.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Users are able to select patients by Nursing Unit, Team and Clinic in addition to MAS Ward and individually.
texts.text: Users are able to select patients by Nursing Unit, Team and Clinic in addition to MAS Ward and individually.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: If the user’s workstation is connected to the Internet, there is a web link to the Vitals/Measurements Home Page to find further information about the software.
texts.text: If the user’s workstation is connected to the Internet, there is a web link to the Vitals/Measurements Home Page to find further information about the software.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: The Vitals Manager portion of the software provides an easy and friendly way to maintain package site parameters.
texts.text: The Vitals Manager portion of the software provides an easy and friendly way to maintain package site parameters.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: On-line Help files provide quick, easy and friendly help in using the software.
texts.text: On-line Help files provide quick, easy and friendly help in using the software.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: All vital types (blood pressure, central venous pressure, circumference/girth, height, pain, pulse, pulse oximetry, respiration, temperature, and weight) are multiple field types.
texts.text: All vital types (blood pressure, central venous pressure, circumference/girth, height, pain, pulse, pulse oximetry, respiration, temperature, and weight) are multiple field types.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Users are able to associate qualifiers with categories.
texts.text: Users are able to associate qualifiers with categories.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Users can enter data for multiple patients at one time using a single template.
texts.text: Users can enter data for multiple patients at one time using a single template.
